zh.lifeSummary: 當Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie於大約0967年出生在法國洛萊姆斯維爾頓時，他的父親Godefroid Ier de Verdun33歲，母親Mathilde Billung von Sachsen27歲。他和Urraca d'Ivrea至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1044年4月19日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在比利時利包格蒙斯特比爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie于大约0967年出生在法国洛萊姆斯維爾頓时，他的父亲Godefroid Ier de Verdun33岁，母亲Mathilde Billung von Sachsen27岁。他和Urraca d'Ivrea至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1044年4月19日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在比利时利包格蒙斯特比爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

en.lifeSummary: When Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie was born about 0967, in Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, was 33 and his mother, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Urraca d'Ivrea. He died on 19 April 1044, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Munsterbilzen, Limburg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie est né environ 0967, à Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Urraca d'Ivrea. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1044, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Munsterbilzen, Limbourg, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie um 0967 in Verdun, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godefroid Ier de Verdun 33 und seine Mutter Mathilde Billung von Sachsen 27. Er hatte mit Urraca d'Ivrea mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 1044 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Munsterbilzen, Limburg, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie è nato il circa 0967 nel Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Urraca d'Ivrea. Morì il 19 aprile 1044, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Munsterbilzen, Limburgo, Belgio.

ja.Louvain, Brabant, Belgium: ベルギーブラバントレウベン

ja.lifeSummary: Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingieが約0967年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバーダンで生まれた時，父Godefroid Ier de Verdunは33歳，母Mathilde Billung von Sachsenは27歳であった。彼はUrraca d'Ivreaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1044年4月19日に故郷で78歳で死去し，ベルギーリンブルグムンステルビルズンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie(이)가 대략 0967년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 베르던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godefroid Ier de Verdun(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Billung von Sachsen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Urraca d'Ivrea(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1044년 4월 19일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 림버그 먼스터빌즌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie nasceu aproximadamente 0967, em Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Urraca d'Ivrea. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1044, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Munsterbilzen, Limburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie родился около 0967 г. в местности вирдун, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Godefroid Ier de Verdun было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Urraca d'Ivrea. Он умер 19 апреля 1044 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности мунстирбилзен, лимбург, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie nació aproximadamente 0967, en Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Urraca d'Ivrea. Murió el 19 de abril de 1044, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Munsterbilzen, Limburgo, Bélgica.
